title: Entre hermanos
writer: Emilio Fernández, Federico Gamboa, Mauricio Magdaleno
actors: Pedro Armendáriz, Carmen Montejo, Rafael Baledón
plot: During the Mexican Revolution, brothers Ramón and Geraldo fall in love with Pilar who is uncertain of which brother she loves. Pilar ends up marrying Ramón but gets pregnant when Geraldo rapes her.
